# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind: Boost DS&A Practice with AI-guided Challenges
- Summary: Showcase how CodeGrind pairs LeetCode-style problems with Azure OpenAI AI assistant for guided learning, dynamic scoring, and immersive tower-defense-themed visualization.
- Slug: codegrind-dsai-practice-boost
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind blends hands-on DS&A practice with AI-assisted problem solving, real-time code execution, and a cyberpunk-themed learning environment. See how AI guidance and live feedback accelerate mastery without leaving the platform.
- CTA: Try a guided DS&A challenge now and compare AI-assisted reasoning vs. solo attempts.
- Visual brief: A short demo video: split-screen showing a LeetCode-style problem, AI assistant chat with GPT-4o, and the real-time code editor executing test cases; include subtle CodeGrind branding and tower-defense visuals in the background.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
